description: Unstructured provides software for parsing, transforming, and enriching unstructured documents and data into AI-ready outputs. Its platform supports document workflows, connectors, and ETL-style processing for GenAI and data ingestion use cases.
summary: Unstructured exposes two authenticated HTTP APIs for document-processing workflows and a legacy partition endpoint, plus a Python CLI/SDK package configured with an API key and workspace-specific API URL; no public GraphQL or hosted MCP server was found.
